info.title: ag-csharp
info.description: CLI tool for initializing .agent configuration for C# Backend projects in Antigravity IDE. Provides AI-assisted coding rules, skills, and workflows.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Antigravity C# Backend Developer Kit - Initialize .agent configuration for AI-assisted development

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize .agent folder in the current directory

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update existing .agent folder with latest templates

commands.name: list
commands.description: List available rules, skills, and workflows
